# o2-scalpel-powershell

Scalpel refactor MCP server for PowerShell via pwsh

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-powershell --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `pwsh` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .ps1, .psm1, .psd1

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply all auto-fixable diagnostics (quickfix) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
